info.name: D'Resto Management API
info.description: REST API collection for JJ D'Resto restaurant management system. Base URL: http://localhost:5000/api/v1

variable.description: UUID returned by POST /orders. Used to track a single order without authentication.
UUID generated once per customer by the mobile app. Sent with every order to group all orders by the same customer. Persisted in app storage.

request.description: Public endpoint — always creates a CUSTOMER account regardless of input. Staff/Manager/Admin accounts are created by an Admin via POST /users.
Login with email. Either email or phone is required.
Login with phone number. Either email or phone is required.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Nasi Goreng Special",
  "description": "Special Indonesian fried rice",
  "price": 40000,
  "categoryId": "CATEGORY_ID_HERE",
  "isAvailable": true
}

query.description: PENDING | CONFIRMED | PREPARING | READY | DELIVERED | CANCELLED

request.description: Returns paginated orders belonging to the authenticated user (filtered by userId).
Public — no auth required. Use the accessToken returned by POST /orders to track any order (guest or logged-in).

query.description: PENDING | CONFIRMED | PREPARING | READY | DELIVERED | CANCELLED

request.description: Requires auth. ADMIN/MANAGER/STAFF see all orders. CUSTOMER role automatically sees only their own orders (filtered by userId server-side).
ADMIN/MANAGER/STAFF only — CUSTOMER role is not allowed. Valid statuses: PENDING → CONFIRMED → PREPARING → READY → DELIVERED | CANCELLED

header.description: Use this OR X-Order-Token, not both
Guest alternative to Bearer auth — use the accessToken returned when the order was created

request.description: Customer or guest submits a MoMo/payment transaction ID for staff to verify. Sets paymentStatus → PENDING_VERIFICATION. Auth: Bearer token (any role, customers restricted to own orders) OR X-Order-Token header matching the order's accessToken. provider is optional.

header.description: Staff/Customer JWT. Use this OR X-Order-Token for guests.
Guest alternative — use the accessToken returned when the order was created

request.description: Returns the full message thread for an order in chronological order. Also marks incoming messages as read. Auth: Bearer token (staff/customer) or X-Order-Token header (guest). CUSTOMER role is restricted to their own orders.

header.description: Staff/Customer JWT. Use this OR X-Order-Token for guests.
Guest alternative — use the accessToken returned when the order was created

request.description: Sends a message on an order. senderType is determined server-side: STAFF for staff/manager/admin JWT, CLIENT for customer JWT or guest X-Order-Token. Blocked on DELIVERED/CANCELLED orders.
Admin only
Admin/Manager only
Admin/Manager only

query.description: Defaults to true — omit to get all active tables

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns active tables by default.
Admin only
Admin only
Admin/Manager only. status: AVAILABLE | OCCUPIED | RESERVED
Admin only. Fails if table has active orders.

item.name: Guest Ordering
item.description: No authentication required. Flow: browse menu → pick table → place order.

request.description: Public. Filter by available=true to show only orderable items.
Public.
Public. Returns active tables. Guest picks a table for DINE_IN orders.

No Authorization header needed. Include guestSessionToken (UUID generated once per customer by the mobile app). Response includes accessToken — saved automatically to {{orderAccessToken}}. Use excludedIngredients per item to avoid specific ingredients (must match values from MenuItem.ingredients).
No Authorization header needed. No tableId for TAKEAWAY. Response includes accessToken — saved automatically to {{orderAccessToken}}.
Public — no auth required. Uses the accessToken auto-saved from step 4. Tracks one specific order.

Public — no auth required. Returns ALL orders placed with this guestSessionToken. The mobile app generates this UUID once (on install or per session) and reuses it across orders. Multiple customers at the same table each have their own UUID.
Guest submits payment transaction ID using X-Order-Token (the accessToken auto-saved from step 4). No Bearer auth needed. Sets paymentStatus → PENDING_VERIFICATION.
Poll this endpoint (e.g. every 8 seconds) to get the latest message thread. Use X-Order-Token from step 4. Also marks staff messages as read.
Guest sends a message to the kitchen/staff. Uses X-Order-Token for auth. senderType will be CLIENT. Blocked on DELIVERED/CANCELLED orders.

item.name: Customer Ordering (Logged In)
item.description: Flow for authenticated CUSTOMER accounts. Register → Login → Browse → Order → Track.

request.description: Always creates a CUSTOMER account.
Public — no auth needed.
Order is linked to the authenticated CUSTOMER via userId. accessToken is auto-saved for tracking. Use excludedIngredients per item to avoid specific ingredients.
Returns only the authenticated customer's orders, paginated.
Public — no auth needed. Uses the accessToken from step 4.
Authenticated customer submits a payment transaction ID for their own order. Sets paymentStatus → PENDING_VERIFICATION. Returns 403 if order belongs to another user.
CUSTOMER can only cancel their own orders. Returns 403 if the order belongs to a different user. Only cancellable if status is not DELIVERED or CANCELLED.
Poll this endpoint (e.g. every 8 seconds) to get the latest message thread. CUSTOMER is restricted to their own orders. Also marks staff messages as read.
Authenticated customer sends a message to the kitchen/staff. senderType will be CLIENT. Returns 403 if the order belongs to another user. Blocked on DELIVERED/CANCELLED orders.
Registers this device FCM token for mobile push. Any authenticated role. Upserts by token, so re-posting after a token refresh or account switch reassigns it.
Detaches the device token from the current account. Call on logout, before clearing the access token.
Web Push public key for the browser dashboard. Auth required.
Browser Web Push subscription. Staff roles only (ADMIN/MANAGER/STAFF).
Removes the caller Web Push subscription. Staff roles only.
Server-Sent Events feed of order_created / order_updated for staff dashboards. Auth via query param because EventSource cannot set headers.
Admin only. password is optional — defaults to '123456' if omitted. role: ADMIN | MANAGER | STAFF (use POST /auth/register for CUSTOMER accounts)
